# services.packagekit

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.packagekit`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.packagekit.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable PackageKit, a cross-platform D-Bus abstraction layer for installing software. Software utilizing PackageKit can install software regardless of the package manager . |
| `services.packagekit.settings` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Additional settings passed straight through to PackageKit.conf |
| `services.packagekit.vendorSettings` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Additional settings passed straight through to Vendor.conf |
